name: fletschhorn-private-estate
description: Luxury Squarespace-ready private alpine estate website for Waldhotel Fletschhorn.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('preview','dist/preview',{recursive:true}); console.log('Built preview assets to dist/preview');"
scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const req=['preview/index.html','squarespace/custom-css.css','src/js/fletschhorn-ui.js']; req.forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('Missing '+f)}); console.log('Repository structure lint passed');"
